title: Illustrative DPP profile — NON-NORMATIVE
description: A deliberately minimal, illustrative Digital Product Passport profile shipped so the `schema` validator has something to exercise out of the box and so documentation has a concrete example. It is NOT a normative ESPR, CIRPASS-2, or UNTP profile and MUST NOT be relied on for compliance. Point `schema_path` at your own profile (or the UN Transparency Protocol schema at https://untp.unece.org) for real validation.

id.description: Stable identifier for the passport (e.g. the GS1 Digital Link URI).

identifier.description: e.g. EU EORI, VAT, or GS1 GLN.

conformity.description: Optional list of regulatory conformity claims.
